allow: PowerShell($git = \(Get-Command git -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); "git: " + $\(if \($git\) { $git.Source } else { "NOT FOUND" }\); $gh = \(Get-Command gh -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); "gh: " + $\(if \($gh\) { $gh.Source } else { "NOT FOUND" }\); if \($gh\) { gh auth status 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 5 })
